title: Silk Touch Mob Spawners
description: Allows you to collect mob spawners with Silk Touch
body:
## Silk Touch Mob Spawners:

If you have ever wanted to build a mob spawner farm anywhere in your world, now you can!

This mod allows you to collect mob spawners with silk touch, while also preserving the mob that is inside. That's right! When you break a zombie spawner, and place it somewhere else, it will still be a zombie spawner!

The mod is currently in beta and may have some bugs so if you find any please comment them
